items.reference:
[TR-352][Inter-Channel-Termination protocol (ICTP) is a peer-to-peer protocol with
      a binary message format that is used by a set of optical line terminal (OLT) channel terminations (CT) comprising a 40-Gigabit-capable next-generation passive optical network (NG-PON2) system to
      exchange channel profile configuration and status information and to coordinate the operation of tunable optical network units (ONUs) in a multi-wavelength channel environment.]
